Incoming org.mxdx.terminal.data: decompress, reorder by seq, emit via onmessage. send(): compress+base64+send. resize(): send org.mxdx.terminal.resize. Reconnect with exponential backoff (1s-30s). Must be xterm.js AttachAddon compatible (binaryType, send, close, onmessage, onclose, onerror).

close_reason: Sequence gap handling with retransmit protocol, 3 new tests
description: In TerminalSocket: buffer incoming events 500ms when gap detected. If gap not filled, send org.mxdx.terminal.retransmit. If retransmit fails, accept gap and continue. Test: deliver seq 0 then seq 2, verify retransmit request sent after 600ms for from_seq=1 to_seq=1.
